claude_take: NVIDIA's Blackwell ramp is driving an AI infrastructure supercycle. Near-monopoly on AI training compute with CUDA moat creating durable switching costs.
gpt_take: AI data-center capex is accelerating and supply-constrained. Street underestimates the length of the AI buildout and NVIDIA's mix shift to high-ASP platforms.
gemini_take: NVIDIA remains the undisputed leader in AI acceleration. The semiconductor sector is experiencing exceptional growth driven by AI infrastructure buildout.

claude_take: Azure is the primary enterprise beneficiary of AI monetization. Copilot integration drives ARPU expansion at minimal incremental CAC — a margin flywheel consensus is too slow to price in.
gpt_take: Azure cloud + Office Copilot upsell creates a durable margin flywheel. One of the cleanest ways to own the AI transition with lower execution risk.
gemini_take: Microsoft is a diversified AI powerhouse. Azure cloud is the primary engine of success with its enterprise software suite deeply integrated with AI capabilities.

claude_take: Apple Intelligence across 2B+ devices is a new AI monetization surface. Services compounds at high margins but current valuation limits upside.
gpt_take: Solid business but multiple is full. Would want to see AI monetization evidence before adding. Services growth remains the key driver.
gemini_take: Apple Intelligence integration and Services expansion are compelling. The brand moat and ecosystem lock-in remain unmatched in consumer technology.
